validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_mean_field_capacity_planner cargo test -p asupersync --test mean_field_capacity_planner_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_mean_field_capacity_planner_clippy cargo clippy -p asupersync --test mean_field_capacity_planner_contract --features test-internals -- -D warnings

smoke_scenarios.description: Mean-field dry-run recommendation for a 64-core / 256 GiB host using capacity-envelope certificate evidence and a balanced agent-swarm workload mix.
